subject: Our power and our voices
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Every day we can work to create meaningful change in this country. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181003_Action_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, we are not voiceless in this fight. We are not powerless.

**Every day we can work to create meaningful change in this country -- simply by talking to those in our community and encouraging them to get involved in the political process.**

That's why we on Team Sanchez have spent the last few months having days of action where we knock doors, meet with voters, and have important conversations. Because if we don't increase engagement, we won't have the votes to create a big blue wave on November 6.

[**Chip in $31 -- the average cost of one of our days of action -- right now. We 're aiming to keep our turnout operation going strong all the way to Election Day!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181003_Action_EM&amount=31&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

If we keep engaging voters, we'll flip critical seats and take back the House. **Then everything will be different.**

We'll be able to block all attacks on the Affordable Care Act. We'll be able to work to fix our crumbling infrastructure. We'll be able to keep Planned Parenthood funded. And we'll be able to conduct critical oversight.

So with the election in 34 days, it is crucial that we knock on every door we can. We can't take anything for granted.

[**Can you rush $31 or more right now?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181003_Action_EM&amount=31&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We can't let any door go un-knocked or any voter go un-spoken to. The stakes are too high.

-Team Sanchez | **Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181003_Action_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Our Next Ad
body:
Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-e/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [ Our Next Ad](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-j/)
First, an admission. When I watch TV (which is rare these days since I'm in a pretty challenging re-election race this time) I rarely watch commercials. I flip to another station to see what's on, and if there's an ad there, I'll flip to a different station. Drives my wife crazy, so we typically watch stuff on different TV's when I'm in town. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [PolitiFact is Anything But](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-d/)
President Obama famously mislead the public when he said, referring to ObamaCare," If you like your health insurance, you can keep your health insurance." PolitiFact on six different occasions determined that THIS STATEMENT WAS TRUE! When, over time, it became apparent to virtually everyone that this statement was NOT true, PolitiFact reversed its opinion, and went so far as to declare that Obama's statement was "the lie of the year" in 2013! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Another Challenge Republicans Face This Year](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-u/)
As I've mentioned in previous blog posts, one of Congressional Republicans' greatest challenges this election cycle is historical. And that's that when one party wins the presidency, the other party almost always picks up seats in the next election. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [If the Democrats Win - Get Ready for Impeachment](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats, for the most part, hate Donald Trump. There are, of course, a few exceptions. And there are a few Republicans, and a fair number of Independents, who don't care for him either. But most Democrats - they think he's gotta go. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-p/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [Fact Checking the Fact Checker](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-m/)
The Cincinnati Enquirer is supposed to be the local paper of record. The one local folks go to who still read the paper - which is evidently a smaller and smaller population every year. My wife and I still get it, but I think they're down to two families on our block that do (including us.) Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-c/) [Contribute](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-q/) [Get a Yard Sign](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-a/) | [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-z/)| [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjhiwik-kujkulhluu-v/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211

name: Anna Bukowski
subject: Since this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Not where we need to be.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181003PM_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, since Tina set a goal this morning of raising $20,000 from grassroots donors before Trump hosts a big money fundraiser tomorrow with our opponent, we've seen 162 people step up to raise $6,615.20. But I'll be honest, we're not on track to hit this goal before tomorrow. And if we don't hit it, that would send a terrible message to Trump, our opponent, and the super PACs already spending big against Tina about how strong this team is. We have to dig deep now and we need every single person reading this to give now to get back on track. Every contribution and every dollar will matter. **Here 's the link to give: [**** https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181003PM_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Tina's counting on us to counter the hundreds of thousands in super PAC spending, attacks from Trump, and everything Republicans will throw at us over the next 34 days. name: Mike Braun
subject: Sleepin’ Joe Was Lying All Along
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhijidy-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter **Sleepin’ Joe continues to lie to Hoosier families, and we’re sick of it.** He had given empty promises that he would support President Trump’s highly qualified nominee, Judge Kavanaugh, pending an FBI investigation. But now that the investigation is almost over, he’s doubling down against Kavanaugh and wants a new nominee. [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhijidy-kujulhlke-j/) The truth is that Sleepin’ Joe never had any intention of working with President Trump or being fair and impartial with Judge Kavanaugh. **He lied to all of us.** Sleepin’ Joe is working for his radical liberal puppet masters in Washington, not for Hoosier families. We deserve better. **Enough is enough.[It’s time to send Sleepin’ Joe packing in November.](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhijidy-kujulhlke-t/)** Mike [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjhijidy-kujulhlke-i/) |

subject: Recommended by the Tampa Bay Times ✅📰

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5of_fzyD2dLAT6yhwzVLIIZ4KmTSH1iACY-4k0Dirlk=/LGD1f4yT5bEXs8cIldPHWPGHJ4NP7JUGZG5McPFG0Ck=) Friends and Neighbors -- More exciting news -- our campaign has just received the recommendation of __ the _Tampa Bay Times! _ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5of_fzyD2dLAT6yhwzVLIIZ4KmTSH1iACY-4k0Dirlk=/xa4_92rpFYCsYda8my_3L21pS3cF6FUYYwncN4hb2eM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/5of_fzyD2dLAT6yhwzVLIIZ4KmTSH1iACY-4k0Dirlk=/xa4_92rpFYCsYda8my_3L21pS3cF6FUYYwncN4hb2eM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) In recommending Jeremy to be our next Chief Financial Officer (CFO), the Times wrote that his election to the office "would be a refreshing change from recent years when the Cabinet has too often been the governor's rubber stamp". and noted that the current CFO "has not served with distinction since being appointed by Gov. Rick Scott." **[(Click here to read the full recommendation).](https://act.myngp.com/el/5of_fzyD2dLAT6yhwzVLIIZ4KmTSH1iACY-4k0Dirlk=/wcLzNcX8LHS_-anb1FJgOPGHkycjVfKGS6yfXoANqV0=)**
**I could not agree more.**

Jeremy would be the check and balance we need in the Cabinet - to help bring about some much needed change in Tallahassee.
This recommendation is an example of our momentum in this race. But as we edge closer to November 6th, every single dollar will count towards our success in getting out Jeremy's message of accountability and an innovation economy and getting out the _**VOTE.**_ **

And we cannot do it without your help. ** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help us keep this momentum going - and get Jeremy into the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5of_fzyD2dLAT6yhwzVLIIZ4KmTSH1iACY-4k0Dirlk=/xa4_92rpFYCsYda8my_3L21pS3cF6FUYYwncN4hb2eM=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Anthony Pardal** Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

Peter, **In 2018, a grassroots campaign must rely on two essential resources: people power and digital communications.** We are blessed with the support of many active volunteers across nine counties. subject: Another Key Barometer of U.S. Economy Hits Postrecession High: ISM Service Index Soars
body:
| |
---
#
# **_Another Key Barometer of U.S. Economy Hits Postrecession High: ISM Service Index Soars_**
#
“A survey of business executives pointed to the strongest U.S. growth in September in more than two decades, suggesting the economy is primed for a strong finish in 2018,” Jeffrey Bartash reports for _MarketWatch_. “The economy is going strong and appeared primed for a strong holiday season to finish out the year.” [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/marketwatch-another-key-barometer-u-s-economy-hits-postrecession-high-ism-service-index-soars/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) “White House press secretary Sarah Sanders lambasted Senate Democrats for their handling of allegations of sexual misconduct lodged against Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh, calling it a ‘complete and total disgrace,’” Melissa Quinn writes in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/sarah-sanders-blasts-senate-democrats-for-handling-of-kavanaugh-allegations). “This is about politics and this is about power, pure and simple. And they have destroyed Judge Kavanaugh's reputation, undermined Dr. Ford's privacy, and tried to upend our tradition of innocence until proven guilty in the process,” Sanders said yesterday. “When Lisa Cummings of Parkton pulled up at Hyde Park Baptist Church on Wednesday, she was shocked to see the president’s daughter giving out food to victims of Hurricane Florence. After Cummings recognized Ivanka Trump, she got out of her sports utility vehicle and hugged the first daughter,” Steve DeVane writes for [**_The Fayetteville Observer_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&http://www.fayobserver.com/news/20181003/ivanka-trump-visits-lumberton-disaster-relief-site). Ms. Trump “spent about 40 minutes meeting relief workers and handing out meals in flood-ravaged Robeson County. She arrived just after 4 p.m. at the church, which is serving as a relief site where N.C. Baptists on Mission, the Red Cross and others are helping hundreds of victims.” Adviser to the President Ivanka Trump “visited the NASCAR Technical Institute in Mooresville Wednesday morning to learn about the facility, which prepares students for careers in automotive-related fields,” Steve Harrison reports for [**WFAE**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&http://www.wfae.org/post/ivanka-trump-visits-nascar-facility-mooresville#stream/0). “The reality is that we have to rethink fundamentally human potential,” Ms. Trump said during a vocational training panel. “We can no longer have kids graduating from third grade not knowing how to read. We also can’t have kids who are leaving university without skills, but loaded with student debt.” First Lady Melania Trump said yesterday “that she ‘will never forget’ her visit to a former slave holding facility on Ghana's coast. She called it ‘very emotional’ and ‘really something that people should see and experience,’” [**_The Associated Press_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/white-house/very-emotional-melania-trump-visits-ex-slave-holding-facility-ghana-n916166) reports. “The U.S. first lady spent nearly an hour on a guided tour of the 17th-century castle, which originally was built by the Swedes for the trading of timber and gold but eventually became a warehouse for slaves shipped to the New World.” “Secretary of State Mike Pompeo announced Wednesday that the U.S. is terminating a 1955 treaty with Iran, after the United Nations' top court used that treaty to order the U.S. to ease some of its sanctions on the regime,” Adam Shaw reports for [**Fox News**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.foxnews.com/politics/pompeo-pulls-out-of-treaty-with-iran-in-response-to-un-court-ruling). “In his press conference, Pompeo said Iran's case was ‘meritless’ and accused the country of ‘attempting to interfere with the sovereign rights of the United States to take lawful actions necessary to protect our national security and abusing the [International Court of Justice] for political and propaganda purposes.’”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1Nzg1NjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTc4NTYyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MDAxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_13)
---

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Go Knights Go!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
I'm so excited for tonight's regular-season opener.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tDQly8pzIhBH6zLyxqstJ7N-KWqk1XgVKsE4tci6n9U=/yrOtOEMTVk6joARKfJUYerh6-nti0hqgRPBeSvwYJ9o=?gpsid=37_57_4140&refcode=em18_181004_VGKopn_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_VGKopn_LG_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Friend,

I'm so excited about the Golden Knights' regular-season opener! I can't tell you how bummed I am to be missing the game, but my daughter promised to send lots of pictures.

To be honest, I'm not the strongest skater, my slapshot could use a little work, and I could definitely use some practice driving the Zamboni.

But when it comes to my ability to bring people together to get things done, I'm basically a hall of famer.

**[The Golden Knights came to Nevada because we put politics aside and worked as a team. Check out our new ad about how we can do the same for our schools, new jobs, and affordable health care.](https://act.myngp.com/el/tDQly8pzIhBH6zLyxqstJ7N-KWqk1XgVKsE4tci6n9U=/yrOtOEMTVk6joARKfJUYerh6-nti0hqgRPBeSvwYJ9o=?gpsid=37_57_4140&refcode=em18_181004_VGKopn_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_VGKopn_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tDQly8pzIhBH6zLyxqstJ7N-KWqk1XgVKsE4tci6n9U=/yrOtOEMTVk6joARKfJUYerh6-nti0hqgRPBeSvwYJ9o=?gpsid=37_57_4140&refcode=em18_181004_VGKopn_img_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_VGKopn_img_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
[WATCH THE AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/tDQly8pzIhBH6zLyxqstJ7N-KWqk1XgVKsE4tci6n9U=/yrOtOEMTVk6joARKfJUYerh6-nti0hqgRPBeSvwYJ9o=?gpsid=37_57_4140&refcode=em18_181004_VGKopn_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_VGKopn_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
It took a lot of hard work by a great team to bring the Vegas Golden Knights to our state. And I'll bring that same attitude to Carson City as your next governor.

And please, let's leave the yelling for the Golden Knights fans in the arena tonight.

Go Knights Go!

Steve

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/tDQly8pzIhBH6zLyxqstJ7N-KWqk1XgVKsE4tci6n9U=/yrOtOEMTVk6joARKfJUYerh6-nti0hqgRPBeSvwYJ9o=?gpsid=37_57_4140&refcode=em18_181004_VGKopn_B2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_VGKopn_B2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

---

Las Vegas NV 89125 United States

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: With all eyes on the Senate, who is watching the House?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
The Republicans in the House snuck this vote through because they knew the American people would object.
#
Friends,
While Senate confirmation hearings for the Supreme Court were underway, the House passed a permanent extension of last year's tax cuts which would shove an additional **$3.8 trillion** upward to the wealthy and corporations on the backs of working families.
The Republicans in the House snuck this vote through because they knew the American people would object. Here's how we can put a stop to this:
* The bill passed the House by only 29 votes
* There was a 26-vote Republican majority
* **There are 27 Our Revolution-endorsed candidates running for Congress**
* **Election day is November 6th**

[**Pitch in $5 right now to help Our Revolution get out the vote and retake the House with a strong progressive majority.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8c9/bed43eb/71f37fdb/75fce536/1693517528/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181003-full&noskip=true")
Our endorsed candidates include progressives like Rashida Tlaib, who was arrested at a Fight for $15 demonstration in downtown Detroit this week alongside Dr. Abdul El-Sayed and McDonald's workers.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8c9/bed43eb/71f37fdb/75fce536/1693517528/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181003-full&noskip=true")
**The fight for economic justice necessitates that we elect progressive leaders like Rashida to join the Progressive Caucus and champion the cause of working families in Congress.**
Will you support Our Revolution's campaign efforts to call, text, and knock on doors over the next 33 days to take back the House in this critical midterm election? Any donation, no matter how small, makes a difference.
[**Pitch in $5 today and help elect Rashida Tlaib and more than two dozen progressive candidates to Congress this November.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8c9/bed43eb/71f37fdb/75fce536/1693517528/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181003-full&noskip=true")
With your help, we will reverse the tax giveaways by the Republican Party and win a $15 minimum wage and a union as a basic right of workers everywhere.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8c9/bed43eb/71f37fdb/75fce536/1693517528/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/progressive-congress?refcode=em181003-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: 33 days to decide the future of America.
body:
Peter,
**_In 33 days, Americans will chart the course for our nation by the values they bring to the polls_.**
The massive political divide we are experiencing in our country today is more than just about which party controls the majority.
What I believe is making this chapter in America’s history especially dark is extreme media bias.
Our history is being written—and the narrative shaped—by media liberal elites and Hollywood celebrities, who in large part, stand against our values of protecting human life, religious liberty, and upholding marriage and family.
Just take a look at the battle for the Supreme Court. _Before a nominee was even announced_ the liberal left opposed President Trump’s pick. From the beginning, it has been a battle of principle against principle.
* **But while the nation is focused on the Supreme Court, the noise level is rising, and the midterm elections are sneaking up on us.**

If faith voters want to protect biblical values and the victories for faith and freedom of the last two years, **_Christians must vote_.**
We must rise above the mainstream media’s liberal bias—every fighting voice that would discourage and distract us—and instead stand up for biblical values at the polls.
**Just consider this short list of actions over the last two years that support the values of our faith:**
* The executive order restoring the Mexico City policy **_curtails abortion funding globally_.**
* The elimination of the Obamacare Individual Mandate, a key step to returning America to the principles of **_individual liberty and limited government_.**
* The decision to **_move the U.S. Embassy in Israel to Jerusalem confirms our nation’s strong commitment to God’s chosen people and their security_.**
* The guidance on Religious Liberty, issued through the Justice Department, **recognizes freedom of religion as a foundational principle of enduring importance in America.**

There are more than 70,000 verified elections taking place across the country. If Christians fail to vote, then our values of human life, religious freedom, and the right of conscience are at extreme risk.
We need your help!
We have a well-organized strategy at work to engage Christians by distributing Christian voter materials via national media, churches, Christian university campuses, and more—but we need YOUR financial support to cross the finish line.
You have faithfully supported our efforts to this point—and we thank you. Thank _you_ for investing in the future of our nation to secure biblical values for generations to come.
**[With just a little over a month left, I’m writing again to ask you to please prayerfully consider giving a special and extra gift today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181004apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181004apl01nd&n=1).**
This election will come down to voter turnout. If Christians fail to show up to the polls, our values won’t either. The future of freedom in America depends upon our values being represented in the halls of Congress and in offices across the nation.
Will you join our efforts to help reach and equip Christians to vote with your financial gift today?
Thank you for bringing your faith to the voting booth and helping others do the same.
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181004apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181004apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181004apl01nd&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181004apl01nd&n=4).

We have a well-organized strategy at work to engage Christians by distributing Christian voter materials via national media, churches, Christian university campuses, and more—but we need YOUR financial support to cross the finish line. You have faithfully supported our efforts to this point—and we thank you. Thank you for investing in the future of our nation to secure biblical values for generations to come. . This election will come down to voter turnout. If Christians fail to show up to the polls, our values won’t either. The future of freedom in America depends upon our values being represented in the halls of Congress and in offices across the nation. Will you join our efforts to help reach and equip Christians to vote with your financial gift today? Thank you for bringing your faith to the voting booth and helping others do the same. United. We Stand.** Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

subject: Thank you, President Obama
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ae/9e00690/5ebc5baf/2401f392/1174249247/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181003_Obama1_fnd_gq_resend_nono__AG_ettx&source=em18_181003_Obama1_fnd_gq_resend_nono__AG_ettx")
Friends,

We've got a little more than one month until Election Day, and earlier this week we were thrilled to get the endorsement of President Barack Obama. I can't begin to put into words how meaningful it is to have President Obama joining our movement.

**[Will you join us by sending $5 today? We'll need everyone standing together to bring the change we so badly need in Florida.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36ae/9e00690/5ebc5baf/2401f3aa/1174249247/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-obama-endorsement?gpsid=13_55_4067&refcode=em18_181003_Obama1_fnd_gq_resend_nono__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181003_Obama1_fnd_gq_resend_nono__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+join+us+by+sending++ask++today+")**

We all know that progress is on the ballot. Hope is on the ballot. A brighter future for Florida is on the ballot. And with your help, we're going to make it a reality.

Bring it home,

Andrew Gillum

body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ The Democrats have heavily relied on wealthy donors to flip the Senate. And it’s working. They’re now far above their monthly fundraising average in an effort to regain the majority. ******Defend President Trump’s Majority**
**[4X Matching Status: Unlocked](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4Mjc3LTAyNGFiYTczZjYzYzQ1MWE4MzY3MGI1ODQ3NzUwYTVj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3AYm9keV90eHRfNHhtYXRjaGluZw%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hYy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgxMDA0X0FFLUdPUDNfUmVwdWJsaWNhbkFsZXJ0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgxMDA0X1RoZVNpdHVhdGlvbklzRGlyZSZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=jCvgn8nZjE8UUpvtNHstvw)**
Fellow Conservative - this is critical.

Have you noticed that Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, Cory Gardner, Mitch McConnell, and many others have been sending you messages?

You are getting all of these because there are only 33 days left until Election Day. We are behind where we need to be. The Democrats have been outraising us, and there isn’t much time left for us to catch up. We must step up NOW. [**All contributions you make to this email to defend our President’s majority will be 4X matched.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4Mjc3LTAyNGFiYTczZjYzYzQ1MWE4MzY3MGI1ODQ3NzUwYTVj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3AYm9keV90eHRfYWxsY29udHJpYnV0aW9uc21hdGNoZWQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hYy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgxMDA0X0FFLUdPUDNfUmVwdWJsaWNhbkFsZXJ0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgxMDA0X1RoZVNpdHVhdGlvbklzRGlyZSZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=_2UzGg1pQ9Y2kXYU1q-mfQ)

**Can you imagine the return of Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer leading Congress?** This would devastate everything we have done over the last year. Tax reform would be gone. Regulatory reforms would be ended. Everything we have worked so hard for would be wasted. We would go back to the failed policies of Obama years. This would be a disaster for America. [Please step up to help us prevent this from happening by chipping in now.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4Mjc3LTAyNGFiYTczZjYzYzQ1MWE4MzY3MGI1ODQ3NzUwYTVj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3AYm9keV90eHRfc3RlcHVw%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hYy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgxMDA0X0FFLUdPUDNfUmVwdWJsaWNhbkFsZXJ0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMTgxMDA0X1RoZVNpdHVhdGlvbklzRGlyZSZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=eVz0y7u8r67nlY23Njz-Gg)

We cannot overstate how dire the situation is:

* The Democrats are raising millions from their progressive supporters to defeat our majority and end our Making America Great Again Agenda.

* Democratic Senate candidates are using the millions they are raising to overrun our great candidates in negative and misleading ads.

* The mainstream media is not on our side. They are promoting narratives that hurt our chances to win in 33 days.

These three things together could cause us to lose President Trump’s majority in November. This would be a disaster. This would be the end to our Making America Great Again agenda. With control, the Democrats would be sure to return us to the failed Obama era policies of the past.

**We can prevent the Democrats from winning, but we need your support NOW.** We have been authorized to 4X match all contributions to this email to help us catch up.

Everything we have worked for is on the line. Will you step up to help us make a difference?

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor. The Democrats have heavily relied on wealthy donors to flip the Senate. And it’s working. They’re now far above their monthly fundraising average in an effort to regain the majority. ****Defend President Trump’s Majority Fellow Conservative - this is critical. Have you noticed that Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, Cory Gardner, Mitch McConnell, and many others have been sending you messages? You are getting all of these because there are only 33 days left until Election Day. We are behind where we need to be. The Democrats have been outraising us, and there isn’t much time left for us to catch up. We must step up NOW. Can you imagine the return of Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer leading Congress? This would devastate everything we have done over the last year. Tax reform would be gone. Regulatory reforms would be ended. Everything we have worked so hard for would be wasted. We would go back to the failed policies of Obama years. This would be a disaster for America. We cannot overstate how dire the situation is: The Democrats are raising millions from their progressive supporters to defeat our majority and end our Making America Great Again Agenda. Democratic Senate candidates are using the millions they are raising to overrun our great candidates in negative and misleading ads. The mainstream media is not on our side. They are promoting narratives that hurt our chances to win in 33 days. These three things together could cause us to lose President Trump’s majority in November. This would be a disaster. This would be the end to our Making America Great Again agenda. With control, the Democrats would be sure to return us to the failed Obama era policies of the past. We can prevent the Democrats from winning, but we need your support NOW. We have been authorized to 4X match all contributions to this email to help us catch up. Everything we have worked for is on the line. Will you step up to help us make a difference? We cannot do this without you. Thank you! name: Makaiah Mohler, Team Morse
subject: RSVP: Our next five town halls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/vjrT_UObmSR548FdpWtSsOtJG2WoQO94yQIEBKhR5Ys=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801004_MM_20181004-townhalls_all_logo)
Peter--with just under five weeks left in this election, we're taking this show on the road. Starting tonight, Jessica will be holding five town halls in communities across our district--from Oakhurst to Roseville.
Tom McClintock may think there are "more pleasant things to do" than speak to the communities he represents and listen to our concerns, but we don't. (And yes, he really said that at last week's debate!)
**RSVP to the town hall nearest you (our first town hall, in Oakhurst, is tonight):**
[Oakhurst ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/JM9jhIiLpnki29-POh03S5O4NPghuADMdhtBbFscWvk=)
---

[Sonora ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/9hd0g8WYtqqa4Ubjq6OWDAhbiMXMG8d41n6it48v5q0=)
---

[South Lake Tahoe ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/VgUXV4rzVy3brGP4Kq-_HxgWLjEbHlst-UK0v_uitBA=)
---

[Cameron Park ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/9oGi7RaxgHcu4d8nXwsZJHD-Qwmqd-F9nuGBYnJ3Wec=)
---

[Roseville ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/zoisFw-76RQOsscSUeHSN3MiHr5WzX8yTVoY-AZo6gU=)
---
Jessica listens to the community on the campaign trail and that is the way she plans to govern. She's running for Congress to fight for our communities, not special interests in DC. And once she's in Washington, her priorities will remain clear--she'll put the people of our district first.
To that end, Jessica has taken the Town Hall Project's Town Hall Pledge, where candidates for public office promise to hold a minimum of four town hall meetings per calendar year in office.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/vjrT_UObmSR548FdpWtSsOtJG2WoQO94yQIEBKhR5Ys=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801004_MM_20181004-townhalls_all_i1)
When McClintock calls his constituents with pre-existing conditions "nuisances," and casts votes that would gut safety nets for our seniors, it's clear he's not listening to us.
**It 's time for a representative who listens to us--and isn't afraid to explain her votes, her decisions, and her allegiances to the communities she represents. **
If you can't make it, [_**chip in with a donation now to help Jessica reach every corner of our district in these final weeks.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/vjrT_UObmSR548FdpWtSsOtJG2WoQO94yQIEBKhR5Ys=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801004_MM_20181004-townhalls_all_l1)
Thank you,
Makaiah
Makaiah Mohler
Deputy Campaign Manager
Morse for Congress
[CONTRIBUTE ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3WmtVVeA5ANF0xmTYi9eLgBxvM1sIriPs-ilrJtjRqE=/vjrT_UObmSR548FdpWtSsOtJG2WoQO94yQIEBKhR5Ys=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801004_MM_20181004-townhalls_contribbutton)

Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign.

1079 Sunrise Ave

Roseville CA 95661 United States

body:

Can you make it?** [**RSVP now to join Ben and Dave in Silver Spring on Saturday afternoon!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378cb3/7ab0e2c4/7e086d33/34982db5/2857804277/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/JealousAndChappelleSilverSpring") [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378cb3/7ab0e2c4/7e086d33/34982db5/2857804277/VEsF/ "http://bit.ly/JealousAndChappelleSilverSpring") | [RSVP »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378cb3/7ab0e2c4/7e086d33/34982db5/2857804277/VEsC/ "http://bit.ly/JealousAndChappelleSilverSpring")

Travis

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: Tammy’s bff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Together, they’ve been a roadblock to President Trump’s agenda. They opposed tax reform, they fought the Obamacare repeal, they even shut down the....

Friend,

Tammy Baldwin made a friend in Washington.

It’s Chuck Schumer.

Together, they’ve been a roadblock to President Trump’s agenda. They opposed tax reform, they fought the Obamacare repeal, they even shut down the government earlier this year.

Now, they’re standing together and implementing outrageous tactics to block our Supreme Court nominee!

Friend, it’s ridiculous, and it’s about time Tammy Baldwin chose a side: US and Wisconsin - or Chuck Schumer and the Swamp.
[DEFEAT TAMMY $25 >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=a3db04b10e6c4931b50b16cde887345f&_e=0mKKmNn5NT4jqCQotQJignEitM3CaL8_-SouikLZ72Fpj9r_ICjJe7lsEKQJCATENWHx7FRy-ELO7O0JpD259oTvoZixbhqSGzwWLdUydHd-D7x6SFQsWhXm5c-NyJYnxJRJdNhkzCfuZtgq8RSb4MwIhRqWJWQ3cYTXapTddm5QC0hXdVbG5qDtXrkNbnwFwAEFzZXtMiRz7L41iVt49jgH1gy4rthPgdbq1-Yx2pcx5vQfvhk69NMQuz_-RyiSjx7K5WX30kv6u2yIzDHjYRtlxcaJbfe9Ftc40VA7UM4wpmcwRgdh1zNEqyHwG2ib82kZCvzEEDbA-_6zGUMMZTwY--TDt0Wusi4joiUiaiiPSSAIQGqd3soLE-07eN4tKWu1pwbgMMAkTkWXtQRCOm-NKkfIgtMPspeO4aswv3yRk3OgP-Pw6dPtUqV8raA6)
---

Tammy can’t have it both ways, and she knows it.

She can have the support of the obstructionist D.C. liberals.

Or she can defend Wisconsin values in Washington.

Well, Tammy and Chuck must be REALLY great friends because she’s made the choice time and time again to abandon us here at home in favor of his radical agenda in the Senate.

There is so much at stake for the future of our country this week. You can choose to help Judge Brett Kavanaugh get confirmed to the Supreme Court. You can help President Trump with his agenda to fill the courts with conservative judges who will uphold the Constitution. I'm writing to you today because you can stop the liberals' games, help confirm Judge Kavanaugh, and shape the history of our country for decades to come. | Your gift will put intense pressure on vulnerable senators to vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh. Now is the time to stop the liberals' obstructionist tactics. Now is the time to stop them from playing petty political games with the life and reputation of a good man, Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Thank you for fighting to the future of the Supreme Court and Judge Kavanaugh. Best, Tim Chapman Executive Director Heritage Action for America Heritage Action for America | 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE, Suite 400 | Washington, DC 20002 107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria VA, 22314

name: Kimberly Padilla
subject: Friday's meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Hi there -- Sherrod's finance director here. On Friday, I have a meeting to discuss our digital fundraising and whether or not we will have the resources to support our TV and online advertising. _If I had to go to that meeting right now,**I'd have to say no.**_ Let me remind you: This is a single-digit race. If we have to pull down our ads, we risk Sherrod becoming more vulnerable and gifting this seat to the special interests. [**Don't let that happen -- click here to make a contribution.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe44/4462dc26/7fcd4271/201975fa/536903356/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181004?refcode=sbe181004_m_other&refcode2=3268183") The good news is that I think we can get back on track and keep our ads up, but it is going to take your help. [**We need another $10,000 before my meeting tomorrow morning. Can you rush in a contribution? Any amount will help close the gap.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe44/4462dc26/7fcd4271/201975fa/536903356/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181004?refcode=sbe181004_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe44/4462dc26/7fcd4271/201975f9/536903356/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181004?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181004_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe44/4462dc26/7fcd4271/201975f9/536903356/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181004?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181004_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe44/4462dc26/7fcd4271/201975f9/536903356/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA0IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181004?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181004_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe44/4462dc26/7fcd4271/201975fa/536903356/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA0IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181004?refcode=sbe181004_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** How well we get Sherrod's message out affects our poll numbers. name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: It takes just 5 minutes to help us build a gigantic Blue Wave!
body:
Activist - Trump and his Republicans are covering up Brett Kavanaugh's lies and drunken sexual assaults so they can jam him onto the Supreme Court and take away our most fundamental rights. We cannot wait until November to take action. Here are two ways you help us build a gigantic Blue Wave in just 5 minutes: **1)[ Download the VoteWithMe app by clicking this link from your phone or tablet](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/6/pR/r5cs/6frWop/w3ffNO0YU/P/P) .** Install [**VoteWithMe**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/s/pZ/r5cs/6frWop/64PzbesrKC/P/P)on your phone or tablet (not your laptop) to see which of your friends are registered to vote, with which political party, and whether they live in a key Congressional district that could flip the House to Democrats. For step-by-step instructions on using [**VoteWithMe**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/v/pZ/r5cs/6frWop/zLnvjqArAD/P/P), just scroll down. **Did you visit VoteWithMe after our last email?****[Tell us about your experience!](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/z/pC/r5cs/6frWop/sAq9ZWYgOU/P/P)** **We work closely with the team at VoteWithMe, and they love to learn about how we can improve this awesome election tool.** ** ** ****2)[Volunteer for The Last Weekend ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/U/pb/r5cs/6frWop/stksemWd6E/P/P)**** ** ** **Join****75,000****of us who have signed up to volunteer with**[**The Last Weekend!**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/j/pb/r5cs/6frWop/sHpbjGc97n/P/P) **We 're thrilled to be part of this amazing coalition effort to mobilize [1 million hours of volunteer time](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/5/pb/r5cs/6frWop/sDIkhPkOsV/P/P) for "GOTV" (Get Out The Vote). When you sign up with [The Last Weekend](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/r/pb/r5cs/6frWop/sdNXgOUnIV/P/P), you will be connected with volunteer opportunities close to home. Watch our star-studded video to learn more. ** [****](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/Y/pb/r5cs/6frWop/zphjDToOvi/P/P) **Thanks for all you do!** **Bob Fertik, Sara Tabatabaie, and the BlueWaveVoters team** ** [**VoteWithMe - Step-by-Step Instructions**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/e/pZ/r5cs/6frWop/sKPbs3dlvG/P/P)** ****1)[Install the app on your phone or tablet](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/3/pZ/r5cs/6frWop/C9N2IbkZc/P/P).**** If you click this link from your phone or tablet it will take you to the Apple or Android store where you can download and install the app. If you're reading this on your laptop, pick up your phone or tablet, open the browser, and type http://votewithme.us/r/dems ****2) Sync your contacts.****
******** ****VoteWithMe was built by a progressive non-profit with a strict[privacy policy ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/W/p1/r5cs/6frWop/vCO197mDne/P/P)that absolutely does not share or sell your data.**** **** ** ** **** **********3) Filter your contacts.**** ** **** ** ** **** ****You can prioritize voters in your own state, other key states like Florida and Ohio, and even the tightest House races in the nation (using the flame icon).**** ** ** **Then select your progressive friends by pressing the arrow to the right of their name. This loads a page with their legal name and voting state for your confirmation. (In the 28 states with party registration, you can also see their party.)** **** ** ** **** **Scroll down for a description of this year 's key races in that state, important voting deadlines, and even your friend's public voting history (when**** they voted but never who they voted for).** **** ** ** **** **It 's especially important to contact friends who only vote for President every 4 years, but skip the crucial Congressional elections like 2018.** **** **Be sure to focus on your progressive friends - don 't contact Trump supporters!** **** ****4) Send a customizable message**** **** ** ** **** ****Use the button at the bottom to load a pre-written message:**** ****** ** ************ **Then pick the appropriate message.**You know your friends best, which is why every message is totally customizable.** You can edit the default message with the edit pencil in the upper right.** **** ** ** **** **When you 're done, choose iMessage for texting or the round upload button for email, Facebook messenger, or any other app you use for messaging.** **** ** ** ******

Let's channel our anger over Brett Kavanaugh into creating the biggest Blue Wave in history. [**Download VoteWithMe and start mobilizing your Democratic friends today!**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/NeA2k/x/pZ/r5cs/6frWop/sE2zaUbShd/P/P) ** ** ** **** ** ** ****
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](https://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDI3LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjUzNzkwNjM4)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Team Kaine
subject: Important update on Brett Kavanaugh (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | | **Stand up against this sham process.** [Add your name to say you won't support the rushed confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107e/3e0906/76ad0112/3e365346/786078745/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/kavanaugh-hearing?source=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+to+say+you+wonrsquot+suppo&utm_campaign=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI")
---
We learned late last night that the FBI has concluded its investigation - notably without interviewing Dr. Ford, Judge Kavanaugh, or many key witnesses, and hidden from the public - and that Republican leadership in the Senate is ready to jam through this nomination.

Senator Mitch McConnell has already scheduled a procedural vote [tomorrow,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107e/3e0906/76ad0112/3e365345/786078745/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/kavanaugh-hearing?source=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI") and is pushing a final confirmation vote this weekend.

**_This process has been insulting to millions of sexual assault survivors around the country and the entire world._** Not only has the GOP refused to take this situation seriously, President Trump has actually mocked Dr. Ford and laughed at her testimony. Here in Virginia, Tim's opponent, Corey Stewart, called Dr. Ford "troubled" during a candidate forum last night. **We can't stand by silently as Republicans rush through their confirmation of this nominee.**

**Stand up and speak up with us.[Add your name here to say you oppose the confirmation of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court of the United States.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107e/3e0906/76ad0112/3e365344/786078745/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/kavanaugh-hearing?source=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+here+to+say+you+oppose+the&utm_campaign=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI") Then, call your Senators and urge them to vote NO by dialing (202) 224-3121.**

Thank you for your support.

_-Team Kaine_

* * *
|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107e/3e0906/76ad0112/3e36535b/786078745/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI&source=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107e/3e0906/76ad0112/3e36535a/786078745/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI&source=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107e/3e0906/76ad0112/3e365359/786078745/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI&source=20181004_1_PET_TEAM_kavanaugh-FBI")

name: Katie Z. (via AndrewGillum.com)
subject: I have a pre-existing condition:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a1/9e00690/5e8e0124/2401fd03/3009456588/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx&source=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx")
Friends,

In second grade, I studied hard for spelling tests. With my parents' help, I memorized all the words and could recite them by heart. But when it came time to take the exam, I faltered -- I just couldn't process spelling words I'd taken so much time to learn.

Eventually, we learned that my disabilities were caused by Neurofibromatosis Type 1, a genetic disorder I was born with -- and one that's considered a pre-existing condition.

Once this was recognized, I was able to get the help I needed. I was the kid who stayed after school and put in extra work with special ed teachers -- my principal even helped track my progress. By high school, I was able to take advanced placement classes in English and History. And now, I have a Master's Degree and work in a field that I love.

**I knew how Neurofibromatosis could limit me, and I figured out how to overcome it -- but I also know that I was lucky. Without the teachers who spent time in and out of the classroom with me or access to affordable healthcare, my story would have ended a lot differently.**

A diagnosis like mine can devastate families. If I had been denied healthcare because of my pre-existing condition, I'm not sure what my family would've done. My condition requires regular, expensive tests to track the disease's growth, in addition to necessary medical care. If it weren't for Obamacare, I wouldn't be able to afford any of it.

Access to affordable healthcare and public education got me where I am today. And that's why I support Mayor Andrew Gillum for Governor of Florida. He believes that healthcare security is a fundamental right for all Floridians, and he knows that for every child to have the chance to succeed, we must properly fund public schools.

**[Mayor Gillum will prioritize what's best for all Floridians -- and I don't know about you, but I think it's long past time we had a Governor like that. Are you with me? Chip in $5 or more now to help Mayor Gillum bring it home this November.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a1/9e00690/5e8e0124/2401fd1b/3009456588/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-kz-hc-supporter?gpsid=8_55_4101&refcode=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Mayor+Gillum+will+prioritize+whats+best+")**

Thanks,

Katie Z.
Proud Andrew Gillum Supporter

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a1/9e00690/5e8e0124/2401fd1a/3009456588/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-kz-hc-supporter?gpsid=8_55_4101&refcode=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a1/9e00690/5e8e0124/2401fd1d/3009456588/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=11+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a1/9e00690/5e8e0124/2401fd1f/3009456588/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx&source=em18_181004_katie_fnd_gq_resend_nono__KZ_ettx")

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: First Lady Melania Trump’s heartfelt visit to Africa
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 4, 2018
## First Lady Melania Trump’s heartfelt visit to Africa
##
##
**This week, First Lady Melania Trump** is on her first solo international trip, visiting the African nations of Ghana, Malawi, Kenya, and Egypt. Wrapping up her**[first stops in Accra and Cape Coast, Ghana](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/readout-first-lady-melania-trumps-visit-accra-cape-coast-ghana/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**, the First Lady took her “Be Best” message to the children of Malawi today. **Lilongwe, Malawi,** is known as the “warm heart of Africa.” This afternoon, Mrs. Trump was greeted at the airport by the First Lady of Malawi, Gertrude Mutharika—and her granddaughter, who handed Mrs. Trump a beautiful arrangement of flowers. **During a ceremony** at the Chipala Primary School in Lilongwe today, Mrs. Trump spoke on the importance of educating and empowering youth. The children’s willingness to learn was moving: More than 8,000 students attend Chipala Primary School. The facility has 22 classrooms, with an average class size of about 106 students per class. **“The growth and success of a country** starts with educating our children,” [**the First Lady said**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/readout-first-lady-melania-trumps-visit-lilongwe-malawi/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d). “The positivity and passion to learn was so evident in each classroom, and I appreciate the time everyone took to show me around the school.” **The First Lady continued her journey** this evening, arriving in Kenya for a two-day visit. [**Watch highlights from the First Lady’s visit to Ghana**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tWNInZZKBMU). **In photos:** [**Follow the First Lady’s Africa trip**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.flickr.com/photos/whitehouse/sets/72157674098246138)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**First Lady Melania Trump walks through the ‘Door of No Return’ at the Cape Coast Castle in Cape Coast, Ghana** | October 4, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA0Ljk1ODE3OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwNC45NTgxNzkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk1MzM1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_13)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Five days out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|

| | | **We are just five days out from New Mexico 's voter registration deadline**, which means we need to make the most of every single day. That means ramping up our organizing efforts in these final days to ensure Democrats are registered to vote.

When we planned for grassroots organizing efforts -- like door knocking and phone banks -- we bought supplies that we thought would last us until after the registration deadline. **But with all the buzz and excitement among Democrats, we 're now projected to run out of supplies before Sunday!**

**[SUPPLY OUR VOLUNTEERS](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+SUPPLY+OUR+VOLUNTEERS&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1")**
Slowing down our organizing efforts right before the voter registration deadline would be a disaster, team. We don't have time to fall behind on our door knocking or phone bank targets, and that's why I am asking for your help today.

**_[We need to keep our volunteers and offices supplied so they can talk to and register as many voters as possible. Can you help us raise another $20,000 before the weekend so we can restock our volunteer supplies? Donate now!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+We+need+to+keep+our+volunteers+and+offic&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ **[Donate $10 for a box of pens](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+to+canvassing+supplies&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1")** Gary Johnson and Mick Rich are spending over six-figures each to support their campaigns, and Johnson has super PACs in the wings ready to boost him.

That's not what I believe in. I'm relying on grassroots supporters and donors like you to win this race. That's why it's so important we hit this goal before the weekend so our teams have what they need before the voter registration deadline.

**_[You can support our grassroots programs by donating here before our deadline tomorrow: http://nm.martinheinrich.com/organizing-supplies](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-oct?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+You+can+support+our+grassroots+programs+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1")_**

Thank you for all you do,

Martin

**P.S. -- Whether you think you 're registered to vote or you've been planning on doing it, now is the time! [Check your voter registration status here ->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b7a5/43d8135f/66efda62/510053bf/4098813853/VEsO/ "http://www.sos.state.nm.us/Voter_Information/Voter_Registration_Information.aspx?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Check+your+voter+registration+status+her&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181004_1_1")**

name: Tim Walz
subject: The President’s rally [donations matched]
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend --

As you know, President Trump is holding a rally this evening in Rochester. I'm hoping you'll join us in standing together against his divisive politics.

Here in Minnesota, we stand with our neighbors. I saw it in my classroom as a teacher, on the field as a football coach, and with my fellow soldiers in the Army National Guard.

We've spent the day talking about everything that is on the line in this election: affordable health care, the rights of workers to organize, and the need for great public schools.

**_I 'm grateful that a group of generous donors has agreed to match all contributions through MIDNIGHT TONIGHT._ I hope you'll take advantage of this opportunity and help out today: **

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Here in Minnesota, we stand with our neighbors. I saw it in my classroom as a teacher, on the field as a football coach, and with my fellow soldiers in the Army National Guard. We've spent the day talking about everything that is on the line in this election: affordable health care, the rights of workers to organize, and the need for great public schools. I 'm grateful that a group of generous donors has agreed to match all contributions through MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. I hope you'll take advantage of this opportunity and help out today: If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** Thank you, friend. I'm grateful. \-- Tim | **** | | Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

name: Dana Bye
subject: Rep. Brat’s “double life”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
At home in Central Virginia, Rep. Brat says one thing. In Washington, he says another.
| | Peter, At home in Central Virginia, Rep. Dave Brat says one thing. _In Washington, he says another._ That is the inescapable conclusion of a recent article in _Politico_ about Rep. Brat's tactics on the campaign trail. **_Politico_ described Rep. Brat and some of his colleagues as leading "double lives" in an attempt to win re-election this fall:** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTiKy7-6vgRPqughKWC1-n8sbvZpm7roqjsRU7zeqWs=/feZ1O7gKMMLYOeCbtxBkswYk9VHpC1khbTBZLfSJlp4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [**You can support our efforts to unseat Rep. Brat and elect Abigail here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTiKy7-6vgRPqughKWC1-n8sbvZpm7roqjsRU7zeqWs=/feZ1O7gKMMLYOeCbtxBkswYk9VHpC1khbTBZLfSJlp4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _For example:_ Rep. Brat's television ads tout his supposedly independent record. But _Politico_ reports that at a private fundraiser last month, Brat admitted that he often "mimics archconservative House Freedom Caucus founder Jim Jordan." **Meanwhile, Rep. Brat has pulled out of the only planned broadcast television debate against Abigail of the entire campaign** \-- so he continues to avoid tough questions about his record from the constituents he is paid to represent. Central Virginians deserve a representative who is honest, independent, and accountable, like Abigail -- not someone who says one thing out in the open and another behind closed doors. [**Peter, can you make a donation today, to help us defeat Rep. Brat and bring new leadership to VA-7?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTiKy7-6vgRPqughKWC1-n8sbvZpm7roqjsRU7zeqWs=/feZ1O7gKMMLYOeCbtxBkswYk9VHpC1khbTBZLfSJlp4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTiKy7-6vgRPqughKWC1-n8sbvZpm7roqjsRU7zeqWs=/feZ1O7gKMMLYOeCbtxBkswYk9VHpC1khbTBZLfSJlp4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.04_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTiKy7-6vgRPqughKWC1-n8sbvZpm7roqjsRU7zeqWs=/feZ1O7gKMMLYOeCbtxBkswYk9VHpC1khbTBZLfSJlp4=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/pTiKy7-6vgRPqughKWC1-n8sbvZpm7roqjsRU7zeqWs=/O4SUkUPjApYIAwETkWI1Px2_OOjJRcTW6pvvSNrHveQ=)_

body:

#
Peter -- When Phil Bredesen learned that Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn rejected the Chattanooga debate that was scheduled for Monday, he insisted that we still create an opportunity for Southeast Tennesseans to have their voices heard in this Senate race. **So on Monday, while Congresswoman Blackburn skipped the Chattanooga debate and instead declared her 100% allegiance to President Trump and at a rally and $25,000-per-couple fundraiser, Governor Bredesen did exactly what he’s been doing this entire campaign — he met with Tennesseans to talk about their ideas and concerns.** **That about sums up the choice that have voters in this race: while Marsha Blackburn is all Washington, Phil Bredesen is all Tennessee.** Hyper-partisans who live in the Swamp know that our message is carrying the momentum in this race. clean_body: Derek, Jim emailed you on Tuesday. Todd emailed you yesterday. Now I'm emailing you because if we run short of our fundraising goals, we're going to risk everything we've fought for. President Trump needs two new members of Congress from New Hampshire that support his America First Agenda. We must utilize this energy and get Republicans elected this November. With your donations, the NHGOP will be able to send out mail, create and print campaign materials, and support our grassroots efforts to get Republicans to the polls in November. Together, we will win! Sincerely, Wayne MacDonaldNHGOP Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Elise C. [finance director]
subject: Standing up for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

It seems impossible to predict what breaking news will come out of Washington these days, but there's one thing we know for certain -- that Senator Klobuchar is there standing up for us.

We know what's at stake. And right now, at this critical moment in our nation's history, Amy is in Washington working to make a difference for all of us.

We're in the last five weeks of this campaign -- and we can't let up now. Over the past week this team has rallied behind Amy like I've never seen, and I want to keep that momentum going strong for the next 33 days.

**Show Amy you 've got her back, just like she's got ours every day. Will you make a contribution today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Justus?=
subject: Join us this Saturday!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Hello Team Banks!

We have a lot going on this Saturday, and I want to make sure you're invited to all of our events. See below for our full schedule and details!

**Steuben County Republicans Breakfast with Jim Banks**
Congressman Banks will be speaking at the Steuben County Republicans monthly breakfast this Saturday at 8:00 am. The breakfast will be at Timbers Steakhouse and Seafood located at [1212 W. Maumee Street in Angola](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=6f4ff1cc85&e=bfe3be83a5). Yard signs will be available for pick up.

**Jim Banks for Congress Yard Sign Blitz Day** Come out and meet up with Congressman Banks this Saturday at the campaign headquarters, located at [5643 Coventry Lane in Fort Wayne](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=99472ef846&e=bfe3be83a5). We will have yard signs ready for pick up and delivery! Refreshments and drinks will be served before folks go out and blitz the community.

**Corn School Parade in LaGrange**
We will be marching in the Corn School Parade in LaGrange at 2:00 pm this Saturday with the LaGrange County Republicans. We will meet on Wayne Street which is just north of State Road 20. Please be at the line-up by 1:40 pm.
**If you can't make it to any of our events but still want to get involved, there will be several other blitzes taking place throughout the District:**
**Adams County Republicans** will have a blitz beginning at 9:00 am at the home of Ed and Kate Dyer, 332 Mercer in Decatur.

**Jay County Republican Party** will be having a blitz at 9:30 am at the Old Ken Kunckle Building located at 470 Meridian Street in Portland.

**Brennan Murray** will be coordinating a door-to-door blitz at 9:30 am in Warsaw. Volunteers will need to meet at the Kosciusko County Republican Headquarters located at [123 W. _and opponent Lou Barletta an A_

Bob has repeatedly stood up to put PA families and their safety first.
Will you join him?**

It's no secret that the NRA doesn't like Bob, but they just made it official. In the just-released NRA grades and endorsements, we're proud to say that Bob has an F.

Bob has stood up for commonsense gun safety solutions by supporting universal background checks and bans on high capacity magazines, assault weapons and bump stocks. He's also sponsoring legislation to prevent people convicted of violent hate crimes from buying guns. Bob is running against a Congressman who consistently refuses to support critical legislation to keep communities safe. These new grades make one thing clear: there's only one candidate in Pennsylvania's Senate race we can trust to protect our families from gun violence.

We're proud of this grade, and we're proud of Bob for standing up to fight for what's right.
