name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: update on Kavanaugh (Will you sign my Supreme Court petition?)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,

Before I was aware of the allegations against Judge Kavanaugh, I watched the responses to my colleagues during his initial nomination hearings. I examined his judicial writings and past public statements. I reviewed the limited number of documents that Republicans shared about Judge Kavanaugh's time working in the White House. Based on what I saw, I was a "no" long before the hearing began.

This week, I joined much of our country in watching Dr. Ford testify about her allegations of sexual assault against Judge Kavanaugh.

And yesterday, I watched as 11 Republicans (all men) voted to advance Judge Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court and shared the frustrations of many people -- especially women.

But this fight isn't over, and I'm not giving up. Sen. Flake has called for a one-week delay for an FBI investigation into the claims against Kavanaugh, and I intend to give it my all on the Senate floor to stop Brett Kavanaugh from receiving a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court.

I'm already a "No," everyone, and I can't stop this nomination from moving forward alone -- I need your help. Will you please sign our petition calling on my colleagues in the Senate to stop forcing Kavanaugh through?

https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180709_PreSCOTUSnominee?source=e20181004_Kavanaugh_act

Mitch McConnell himself said that Republicans intend to "plow right through" with this nomination. That's alarming in and of itself, but it is especially concerning considering these allegations and the thousands of pages of unreleased records related to Kavanaugh's history.

If you haven't taken action yet, time is running out and we desperately need your voice. Below you'll find the link to our petition, and I am personally asking you to sign:

https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180709_PreSCOTUSnominee?source=e20181004_Kavanaugh_act

Thank you, this is so important.

With every good wish,

Senator Maggie Hassan

Contribute - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e220180929_Kavanaugh_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: TimKaine.com - Voter Protection
subject: The right to vote + your role, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
The most important voice on November 6, 2018 is that of the people. Are you interested in helping elevate these voices? --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa18/3991059603/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | **The most important voice on[November 6, 2018](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa1f/3991059603/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-vopro?refcode=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6+2018&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND") is that of the people. Are you interested in helping elevate these voices?**

**Volunteer ->** [Lawyers, law students and Virginians are needed at polling places. Click here to sign up.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa1e/3991059603/VEsF/ "https://vademocrats.org/protect-the-vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Lawyers+law+students+and+Virginians+are+&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND")

**Donate ->** [Click here to send a donation that supports our voter protection program to make sure voters are educated and protected throughout the voting process.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa1d/3991059603/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-vopro?refcode=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Click+here+to+send+a+donation+that+suppo&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND")
---
Derek,

In Virginia, voters are already voting, turning in absentee ballots by mail or in person. And in a little over a month, everyone else will be filing into their local polling place to cast ballots. Our Voter Protection team has been on the ground since the summer making sure that every Virginian will be able to exercise their right to vote by the time polls close on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa1c/3991059603/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-vopro?refcode=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND")

**We could use your help. Are you a lawyer, law student or know someone who is and wants to help on Election Day?[Fill out this form or forward this to your contact and have them click here and fill in their information. Our team will be in touch.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa13/3991059603/VEsA/ "https://vademocrats.org/protect-the-vote?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Fill+out+this+form+or+forward+this+to+yo&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND")**

Virginia residents are especially helpful as they can be inside polling places on Election Day, but there are so many ways to help make sure Virginians can vote no matter your background or where you are located.

**Here 's how else you can help: Make a donation today that supports our [Voter Protection team](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f107f/3e0906/76bc8a94/3e37aa12/3991059603/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-vopro?refcode=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+team&utm_campaign=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND&source=20181004_2_FR_VoPro_Voter-Protection-LDND") to make sure we have all the resources we need to send lawyers to polling places across Virginia on Election Day and make sure every Virginian is able to cast their ballot:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Join Joe Biden for an Early Vote Rally!
body:
Vice President Joe Biden is joining Joe Donnelly on Friday, October 12 to rally Hoosiers to the polls -- and we want you to be there! |
---
| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d0a/7377f838/390b1279/51f8ea97/3203216465/VEsH/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")
---
Peter --

Vice President Joe Biden is joining Joe Donnelly on Friday, October 12 to rally Hoosiers to the polls -- and we want you to be there! **[Will you join us?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d0a/7377f838/390b1279/51f8ea97/3203216465/VEsE/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")**
**Hoosiers United Early Vote Rally with VP Joe Biden**
Friday, October 12
Hammond Civic Center
5825 Sohl Ave., Hammond, IN 46320

Doors open at 4:00 p.m. (CT)
Rally begins at 5:00 p.m. (CT)

**[RSVP](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d0a/7377f838/390b1279/51f8ea97/3203216465/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")**
**(Event is FREE, but you must register in advance.)**
---
**The stakes couldn 't be higher in November.** Health care, good opportunities for working families, voting rights, and protecting Social Security and Medicare are all on the ballot. Vice President Biden is a champion for the priorities we all share. He's coming to Indiana because he knows how important it is for Hoosiers to get to the polls and make their voices heard.

**[Don't miss your chance to see Joe and VP Biden in Hammond!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d0a/7377f838/390b1279/51f8ea97/3203216465/VEsC/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScah37-OydrhLSnZxpdWsFZfSmrIZYwSk4_pOfIbWZX859mPw/viewform")** Please feel free to forward this email to family, friends, and neighbors. Remember, the event is FREE! You just need to register beforehand.

See you soon!

Team Donnelly

** __Please read the following important information.__**

Only four tickets per registration. Ticket registration will close at 12 p.m. on Thursday, October 11. **Tickets are required for entry.**

Tickets will be available for pickup at Indiana Democratic Party coordinated campaign **[field offices](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d0a/7377f838/390b1279/51f8ea96/3203216465/VEsD/ "https://joeforindiana.com/offices/")** on Wednesday and Thursday, October 10-11 from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. and Friday, October 12 from 9 a.m. to 12 p.m. **You must pick up your ticket at a field office. You cannot receive your ticket by email.**

_Media must respond to press@joeforindiana.com by 12 p.m. on Thursday, October 11, to be credentialed to cover this event. Riser space will be available on a first-come, first-served basis._

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Donnelly for Indiana, Indiana Democratic Congressional Victory Committee, and Hoosiers First PAC.
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d0a/7377f838/390b1279/51f8ea91/3203216465/VEsA/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

body:
We must send a message.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181004PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, tonight my opponent will stand with a President who separated children from their parents and put them into camps, who would defund Planned Parenthood, and who is trying to confirm an anti-choice majority to the Supreme Court to overturn Roe vs. Wade. **The choice has never been more clear, and the stakes for this race have never been higher. She must be defeated.[Pitch in before midnight to defeat Karin Housley and stop Trump from turning this seat red. We can hit our $20,000 goal and respond to their attacks if you step up now. ](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: M. Kelly
subject: just 33 days!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
We're just **33 days** out from Election Day, friends.

We have momentum on our side, but we know that corporate special interests are lining up behind Chris Sununu.
**We're up against dark-money organizations, like the Koch brothers' network , that are flooding this race with big-dollar donations for Chris Sununu **to keep him in Concord so he can continue putting their corporate agenda over New Hampshire's working families.
Since I refuse to accept donations from corporate special interests, I'm depending on grassroots supporters like you to help us hit every fundraising goal between now and Election Day.

And this opportunity came just in time: **A group of donors just offered to MATCH every gift until Saturday to make sure we can reach our $20,000 goal!**
**Please, join President Obama in supporting our campaign. Donate immediately:[_Can you give $5 or more right now to help me win in November and flip New Hampshire blue? Every dollar you give will be DOUBLED!_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc49f4/d0ce7de/50540bd8/9cd90a5/3986270696/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTk4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk198-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Donate immediately: "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thank you for your critical support at a time when it couldn't matter more. Molly | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "=" | | Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent

name: Linda Awbrey, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Hey, I have hope
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a2/9e00690/5eecbe60/2401f80b/2131861617/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&source=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx")
Friends,

I first met Andrew when he was at Gainesville High School.

Even then, I knew Andrew was a natural leader with a big heart -- he just needed the right encouragement and a chance to succeed.

As educators, we help create a path for every child to succeed, no matter where they're from. But under Rick Scott, that has become increasingly harder to do.

**[Chip in $5 or more now to elect Andrew and ensure better for the future of Florida's education system.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a2/9e00690/5eecbe60/2401f803/2131861617/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-oct-education-resends?gpsid=8_55_4127&refcode=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Chip+in++ask++or+more+now+to+elect+Andre")**

I've seen firsthand how Florida's public education system is struggling. Schools are underfunded -- especially those in minority communities -- and teachers are underpaid. We tell children that if they get an education, they can do anything. But then, the people in power turn around and put education on the bottom of their priority list, placing those very foundations for success and the future of our kids at risk.

But I have hope -- because Andrew's already making plans to turn things around to make sure teachers are treated with the respect we deserve -- so we can get back to what we do best: educating.

As Governor, Andrew will invest in rebuilding our public schools, raise teachers' starting salaries, and invest in early childhood education programs. Because he knows public education is the best path to equal opportunity and that, as a state, we need to do better for our youth.

**[So today, join Andrew and me in thanking teachers all across the state, then chip in $5 to ensure we do better for future generations.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a2/9e00690/5eecbe60/2401f802/2131861617/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-oct-education-resends?gpsid=8_55_4127&refcode=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+So+today+join+Andrew+and+me+in+thanking+")**

Thank you,

Linda Awbrey

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36a2/9e00690/5eecbe60/2401f805/2131861617/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-oct-education-resends?gpsid=8_55_4127&refcode=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181005_educat_fnd_gq_nopn__LA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DONATE")
